title: Levice, Nitra Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Levice, Nitra Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Levice is a city in Nitra Region with a population of 32,000. A historic town in southern Slovakia, known for its medieval castle, thermal baths, and a strategic location in the fertile Danube lowlands.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
